description: Provides training in the analytical skills and tools needed to comprehend, assess, and address complex public policy decisions. Overview of the theory and application of quantitative and qualitative analysis methods relevant to public policy decision-making and policy analysis.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ECON 101orA A E 101(215 prior to Fall 2024)
